critique_summary: Decision policy: ACCEPT if visual_relevance >= 7, prompt_faithfulness >= 7, transformation_quality >= 7, and automatic signal >= threshold; otherwise REVISE. The generated image has pixel similarity 0.84, color similarity 0.11, brightness shift -0.00, and change level 0.16 for variation mode. Automatic signal (heuristic_proxy) is 0.576. CLIP was unavailable or disabled, so this score is a labeled color/brightness heuristic proxy rather than true CLIP similarity.

human_evaluation_template.human_notes: Manual review: the street layout, cars, road, buildings, and clear weather remain recognizable; the result is coherent but still has demo-level polish.
